message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in class_analysis.zig

- Fix if_stmt.@"orelse" -> if_stmt.else_body in analyzeAllClassTraits
- Add for_stmt, while_stmt, try_stmt, with_stmt, match_stmt handlers to analyzeAllClassTraits
- Add for_stmt/while_stmt orelse_body, try_stmt else_body/finalbody, with_stmt, match_stmt to collectBoundMethodRefs
